name: Release Notes 3.12.1 - POS and Back Office
body:
Release Notes 3.12.1 - POS and Back Office

Release Date: 17th June 2020

In this release we've made some improvements to functionality as part of our ongoing commitment to evolve and enhance Retail Express.

Note: This release also includes an update to the Warehouse Management System API - refer to the API Release Notes for more information.

Improvements

Outlets

We have added the Outlet/Warehouse ID number to the Outlet maintenance window, making it easier to know which Outlet is being referred to within API integrations.

The Outlet ID can be seen in the Outlets table via Settings > Locations/Outlets > Outlets.

 

Resolutions

End of Day ReportRestored the ability to use the Sort feature by clicking on the column headings
POS - InvoicesLogos are displayed at an appropriate size when an invoice is emailed
Product ReportPerformance improvements
POS - PaymentsSecurity override pop-up now appears before a negative PC-EFTPOS payment
Purchase OrdersUsers will not be able to view the Outlet associated with a PO if they don't have access to that Outlet
Stock Value vs Sales ReportPackages are excluded from the report (as the individual components that make up a package will already be included in the values)
Product Search & ManagementPerformance improvements
Stock Forecast ExportPerformance improvements
Supplier UploadPerformance improvements
